de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava

Class ProofJavaParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava.ProofJavaParser
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ProofJavaParserConstants

    public class ProofJavaParser
extends Object
implements ProofJavaParserConstants
    JavaCC AST generation specification based on the original Java1.1 grammar that comes with javacc, and includes the modification of D. Williams to accept the Java 1.2 strictfp modifier. Several patches have been added to allow semicola after member declarations. Augmented with special constructs used in KeY proofs. These are:
    • method-call statement
    • method-body statement
    • implicit fields
    • nearly all the JML expression syntax supported by KeY in set statements

      static ImplicitIdentifier ImplicitIdentifier()
      an implicit identifier is embraced by "<" and ">" To make sure "<a>" is an implicit identifier and "< a>" is not the first "<" token can be tested whether the token IMPLICITIDENTIFIER had been found and reduced to "<".

      • checkConstruction

        private static void checkConstruction(SourceElement constrResult)
                               throws ParseException
        checks whether or not the tree construction result is valid. Currently this only checks whether or not the result is null.
        Parameters:
        constrResult - the result of a factory call
        Throws:
        ParseException - if the result is not legal

        public static final ImplicitIdentifier ImplicitIdentifier()
                                                   throws ParseException
        an implicit identifier is embraced by "<" and ">" To make sure "<a>" is an implicit identifier and "< a>" is not the first "<" token can be tested whether the token IMPLICITIDENTIFIER had been found and reduced to "<".
